projects.title: Regenerative Braking Energy Recovery Simulation
projects.description: Build a Python simulation that models regenerative braking energy recovery as a function of vehicle mass, speed, and deceleration rate. Pair it with a Fusion 360 CAD model of a brake caliper assembly with full GD&T annotations.
deliverables: Python simulation script with parametric inputs
Fusion 360 brake caliper assembly (STEP + drawing)
Engineering report comparing energy recovery across 3 vehicle weight classes
GitHub repository with README and results plots
resume_bullets: Developed Python-based regenerative braking simulation modeling energy recovery vs. vehicle mass, achieving 28% improvement over baseline; created brake caliper CAD in Fusion 360 with full GD&T per ASME Y14.5.
Built parametric energy recovery model in Python and MATLAB validating regenerative braking efficiency across 3 EV weight classes; documented results in engineering report with Plotly visualizations.
Designed brake caliper assembly in Fusion 360 (Autodesk Certified workflow) with tolerance stack-up analysis, supporting regenerative braking simulation that quantified 15-28% energy recovery range.

projects.title: EV Battery Thermal Management Analysis
projects.description: Model a liquid-cooled battery pack cold plate in SolidWorks, then run thermal FEA in ANSYS to optimize coolant channel geometry. Analyze temperature distribution across a 12-cell module under fast-charge conditions.
deliverables: SolidWorks cold plate assembly with cooling channels
ANSYS thermal simulation report with temperature contour plots
Design optimization summary (3 channel geometries compared)
GitHub repo with simulation setup files and results
resume_bullets: Designed liquid cooling cold plate for 12-cell EV battery module in SolidWorks; performed thermal FEA in ANSYS achieving 18% reduction in peak cell temperature under fast-charge conditions.
Optimized battery thermal management system using ANSYS Fluent CFD, comparing 3 coolant channel geometries and selecting design with best temperature uniformity (delta-T < 3C across module).
Modeled Battery Management System thermal interface in SolidWorks with full GD&T callouts; validated thermal performance via FEA against SAE J2464 battery safety requirements.

projects.title: CAN Bus Vehicle Diagnostics Dashboard
projects.description: Parse simulated CAN bus data from an EV powertrain using Python, build a real-time dashboard displaying motor RPM, battery SOC, and inverter temperature. Use pandas for data wrangling and Plotly for visualization.
deliverables: Python CAN bus data parser with simulated OBD-II frames
Streamlit dashboard showing live telemetry plots
Anomaly detection for battery SOC drops and thermal events
GitHub repo with sample datasets and documentation
resume_bullets: Built Python-based CAN bus diagnostics dashboard parsing simulated EV powertrain data, displaying motor RPM, battery SOC, and inverter temperature in real-time Plotly visualizations.
Developed anomaly detection pipeline for Battery Management System telemetry using pandas, flagging abnormal SOC drops and thermal events with 95% detection accuracy.
Created end-to-end CAN protocol data pipeline in Python for EV powertrain monitoring, processing 10,000+ data frames and generating automated health reports.

projects.title: EV Suspension Knuckle Topology Optimization
projects.description: Design a front suspension steering knuckle in SolidWorks, apply static and fatigue loads in ANSYS, then use topology optimization to minimize mass while meeting strength targets. Compare original vs. optimized designs.
deliverables: SolidWorks baseline and optimized knuckle models
ANSYS FEA report with stress contours and factor of safety maps
Mass reduction summary with before/after comparison
GitHub repo with FEA setup and optimization parameters
resume_bullets: Performed topology optimization on EV suspension knuckle using ANSYS, achieving 22% weight reduction while maintaining factor of safety above 2.0 under combined braking and cornering loads.
Designed and analyzed steering knuckle in SolidWorks with full GD&T; validated structural integrity through FEA fatigue analysis meeting 500,000 cycle durability requirement.
Applied lightweight optimization techniques to cast aluminum knuckle, reducing mass from 4.2kg to 3.3kg; documented DFM considerations for sand casting production.

projects.title: DFMEA for EV High-Voltage Battery Pack
projects.description: Conduct a Design Failure Mode and Effects Analysis for an EV battery pack enclosure, identifying potential failure modes, severity ratings, and recommended actions. Create the DFMEA table in Excel and summarize findings.
deliverables: Complete DFMEA spreadsheet with 30+ failure modes analyzed
Risk Priority Number rankings and mitigation actions
Summary report with top 10 critical failure modes
Presentation slides for design review
resume_bullets: Conducted DFMEA on EV battery pack enclosure analyzing 30+ failure modes per IATF 16949; identified 5 critical risks and recommended design changes that reduced RPN by 40%.
Led Design FMEA review for high-voltage Battery Management System enclosure, applying APQP methodology to prioritize corrective actions across thermal, structural, and electrical failure modes.
Created comprehensive DFMEA documentation for EV battery pack per automotive quality standards, enabling structured risk assessment that informed prototype validation test plan.

projects.title: Predictive Maintenance Dashboard for CNC Machines
projects.description: Build a Python dashboard that ingests simulated vibration sensor data from CNC spindles, applies basic machine learning (scikit-learn) to predict tool wear, and flags maintenance windows before failure occurs.
deliverables: Python data pipeline for vibration sensor ingestion
Scikit-learn classification model (Random Forest) for tool wear prediction
Streamlit dashboard with live alerts and trend charts
GitHub repo with simulated datasets and model training notebook
resume_bullets: Developed predictive maintenance system using Python and scikit-learn, analyzing CNC spindle vibration data to predict tool wear with 92% accuracy, reducing unplanned downtime by 35%.
Built real-time condition monitoring dashboard in Streamlit processing vibration sensor data from 5 CNC machines, implementing statistical process control charts for trend analysis.
Created machine learning pipeline for CNC predictive maintenance using Random Forest classifier, processing 10,000+ sensor readings and generating automated maintenance alerts.

projects.title: Automated Assembly Line PLC Control Simulation
projects.description: Design a PLC control sequence for a 4-station automated assembly line using ladder logic. Simulate conveyor indexing, pneumatic actuators, and sensor interlocks. Document the I/O table and sequence of operations.
deliverables: PLC ladder logic program with full I/O mapping
Sequence of Operations document
Timing diagram for 4-station cycle
SolidWorks layout drawing of the assembly cell
resume_bullets: Designed PLC ladder logic for 4-station automated assembly cell, programming conveyor indexing, pneumatic actuator sequences, and safety interlocks achieving 12-second cycle time.
Programmed Allen-Bradley PLC for automated assembly line with sensor-driven interlocks and fault recovery; documented complete I/O table and sequence of operations per lean manufacturing standards.
Simulated PLC-controlled assembly process integrating FANUC robot pick-and-place with pneumatic fixturing, reducing manual intervention by 85% and improving throughput by 22%.

projects.title: Lean Manufacturing Value Stream Mapping Tool
projects.description: Create a Python tool that lets users input process steps, cycle times, and inventory levels to auto-generate a current-state value stream map. Calculate takt time, lead time, and identify waste using Lean principles.
deliverables: Python CLI/Streamlit tool for VSM data entry
Auto-generated value stream map visualization
Waste identification report with Lean improvement suggestions
GitHub repo with sample factory data
resume_bullets: Built Python-based value stream mapping tool automating current-state analysis for manufacturing processes; identified 3 major waste sources and proposed lean improvements reducing lead time by 30%.
Developed Lean Manufacturing analysis tool using Python and pandas, calculating takt time, process efficiency, and WIP levels across 8 production stations with automated Plotly visualizations.
Created digital value stream mapping application applying Six Sigma and lean principles, enabling rapid identification of bottlenecks and driving kaizen events that improved OEE by 15%.

projects.title: CNC Fixture Design with GD&T Analysis
projects.description: Design a custom CNC workholding fixture in SolidWorks for a prismatic part with tight tolerances. Perform tolerance stack-up analysis and create a fully dimensioned drawing with GD&T callouts per ASME Y14.5.
deliverables: SolidWorks fixture assembly with 3-2-1 locating scheme
Tolerance stack-up spreadsheet with worst-case and RSS analysis
Engineering drawing with full GD&T per ASME Y14.5
DFM review document for fixture manufacturing
resume_bullets: Designed CNC workholding fixture in SolidWorks using 3-2-1 locating principle; performed tolerance stack-up analysis ensuring critical features held within 0.025mm across 5 datum references per GD&T.
Created fully dimensioned engineering drawings with GD&T callouts per ASME Y14.5 for CNC fixture; conducted DFM review reducing manufacturing cost by 20% through material and process optimization.
Engineered custom fixture for 5-axis CNC machining operation in SolidWorks, validating design through worst-case tolerance stack-up analysis and achieving first-pass yield improvement of 15%.

projects.title: Factory OEE Tracking Database
projects.description: Build a SQL database and Python interface for tracking Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE) across multiple production lines. Create queries for availability, performance, and quality metrics with automated weekly reports.
deliverables: SQLite database schema for production tracking
Python scripts for data entry and OEE calculation
Automated weekly OEE report generator
Streamlit dashboard for real-time OEE monitoring
resume_bullets: Designed and built SQL database for OEE tracking across 4 production lines, writing automated queries that calculated availability, performance, and quality metrics with weekly report generation.
Developed Python-based OEE monitoring system integrated with factory SQL database, enabling real-time visibility into equipment effectiveness and driving 12% improvement in line availability.
Created production data pipeline using Python and SQL, automating OEE calculations and trend analysis for lean manufacturing continuous improvement initiatives across the facility.

projects.title: Robotic Cell Layout Optimization
projects.description: Design and optimize a robotic welding cell layout in SolidWorks with FANUC robot reach analysis. Simulate cycle time, identify interference zones, and ensure OSHA safety compliance for the guarding enclosure.
deliverables: SolidWorks 3D layout with robot reach envelope visualization
Cycle time analysis spreadsheet
Safety risk assessment and guarding design
AutoCAD 2D floor plan for facilities team
resume_bullets: Designed robotic welding cell layout in SolidWorks integrating FANUC robot reach analysis, optimizing station placement to reduce cycle time by 18% while maintaining OSHA safety clearances.
Engineered safety guarding enclosure for industrial robotics cell in SolidWorks and AutoCAD, conducting interference analysis and ensuring compliance with ANSI/RIA safety standards.
Optimized robotic cell layout for lean manufacturing flow, eliminating operator walk time by 40% through strategic fixture placement and implementing DFM principles for weld joint accessibility.

projects.title: Lightweight Bracket Topology Optimizer
projects.description: Design an aerospace mounting bracket in SolidWorks, then write a Python script that iterates material-to-strength ratios using basic stress equations. Compare aluminum, titanium, and composite options with FEA validation in ANSYS.
deliverables: SolidWorks bracket models in 3 materials
Python optimization script with stress/weight Pareto plots
ANSYS FEA validation report for selected design
GitHub repo with scripts and engineering documentation
resume_bullets: Developed Python-based topology optimization tool for aerospace bracket, iterating material-to-strength ratios across Al 7075, Ti-6Al-4V, and CFRP; achieved 35% weight reduction validated by ANSYS FEA.
Designed lightweight mounting bracket in SolidWorks for satellite payload interface; performed structural FEA in ANSYS Mechanical confirming factor of safety > 2.5 under launch vibration loads.

Created parametric optimization script in Python comparing 3 aerospace materials, generating stress/weight Pareto frontiers and selecting design with best strength-to-weight ratio per AS9100 standards.

projects.title: UAV Airframe Structural Analysis
projects.description: Model a fixed-wing UAV airframe in CATIA, define flight load cases (2.5g maneuver, gust), and run structural FEA in ANSYS. Analyze wing spar fatigue life and generate a stress report per aerospace standards.
deliverables: CATIA wing and fuselage assembly model
ANSYS structural FEA with 3 load cases
Fatigue life prediction report for wing spar
Compliance matrix against AS9100 documentation requirements
resume_bullets: Modeled fixed-wing UAV airframe in CATIA V5 and performed structural FEA in ANSYS for 2.5g maneuver and gust load cases; achieved all stress margins positive with 18% mass margin.
Conducted fatigue analysis on carbon fiber composite wing spar using ANSYS, predicting 50,000+ flight-hour life under spectrum loading per aerospace durability requirements.
Developed UAV structural analysis package per AS9100 documentation standards, including FEA reports, material allowables, and compliance matrices for airworthiness certification.

projects.title: Robotic Arm Inverse Kinematics in ROS
projects.description: Implement inverse kinematics for a 6-DOF robotic arm using ROS2 and Python. Simulate in Gazebo, plan collision-free paths, and interface with a SolidWorks-designed end-effector for pick-and-place tasks.
deliverables: ROS2 package with IK solver and motion planning
Gazebo simulation of pick-and-place sequence
SolidWorks end-effector CAD with URDF export
GitHub repo with launch files and documentation
resume_bullets: Implemented inverse kinematics solver for 6-DOF robotic arm in ROS2 using Python and C++, achieving sub-millimeter positioning accuracy in Gazebo simulation environment.
Designed robotic end-effector in SolidWorks and exported URDF for ROS2 integration; simulated collision-free path planning for pick-and-place operations with 98% task success rate.
Developed ROS2-based robotic arm control package integrating inverse kinematics, motion planning, and gripper actuation; reduced cycle time by 25% through optimized trajectory planning.

projects.title: Spacecraft Thermal Cycling Simulation
projects.description: Build a Python thermal model of a small satellite in low Earth orbit, computing temperature swings between sunlight and eclipse phases. Validate against simplified ANSYS thermal FEA and recommend thermal control strategies.
deliverables: Python orbital thermal model with parametric inputs
ANSYS thermal FEA validation of critical components
Thermal control design trade study report
GitHub repo with simulation code and results
resume_bullets: Built Python orbital thermal model for CubeSat computing temperature extremes across sunlight/eclipse phases, correlating within 5% of ANSYS thermal FEA validation results.

Performed spacecraft thermal analysis using ANSYS and MATLAB, evaluating passive thermal control strategies and recommending MLI blanket configuration that maintained all components within allowable ranges.
Developed systems engineering thermal analysis package for small satellite, integrating Python simulation with ANSYS FEA to predict orbital temperature cycling from -40C to +65C.

projects.title: Composite Layup Optimization for UAV Wing Skin
projects.description: Design a carbon fiber composite layup schedule for a UAV wing skin using classical lamination theory in Python. Optimize ply orientations for minimum weight while meeting strength and stiffness requirements.
deliverables: Python CLT solver for laminate analysis
Optimized layup schedule with ply-by-ply breakdown
Failure analysis using Tsai-Wu and max strain criteria
Comparison report: quasi-isotropic vs. optimized laminate
resume_bullets: Developed Python-based classical lamination theory solver for CFRP composite optimization, determining ply schedule that reduced wing skin mass by 20% while meeting all strength margins.
Optimized carbon fiber composite layup for UAV wing using Python and MATLAB, applying Tsai-Wu failure criteria and achieving 30% stiffness improvement over quasi-isotropic baseline.
Created composite materials analysis toolkit in Python for aerospace structures, automating laminate optimization across 50+ ply configurations and generating manufacturing-ready layup schedules.

projects.title: Drone Flight Controller Sensor Fusion
projects.description: Implement a Kalman filter in Python/C++ for fusing IMU and GPS data on a quadcopter. Test with simulated noisy sensor data and visualize estimated vs. true position/attitude.
deliverables: Extended Kalman Filter implementation in Python
C++ port for embedded deployment
Simulation with noisy sensor data and ground truth comparison
GitHub repo with visualization notebooks
resume_bullets: Implemented Extended Kalman Filter in Python and C++ for UAV sensor fusion, combining IMU and GPS data to achieve position estimation accuracy within 0.5m RMS error.
Developed drone flight controller sensor fusion algorithm using Python, processing noisy accelerometer and gyroscope data to estimate attitude within 1 degree accuracy.
Created simulation framework for testing sensor fusion algorithms on quadcopter platform, validating Kalman filter performance against ground truth data across 100+ test scenarios in MATLAB.
